subcodes.title: Words to the friends spoken in Dec. 1907
subcodes.first_line: I have seen many places, but none has the vivifying air and the beauty of the Shrine of the Bab. Ere long this mountain will be developed.
subcodes.first_line_orig: من خیلی جاها را دیده ام هیچ جا صافی هوا و صفای مقام اعلی را ندارد
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @future of Haifa; of the Holy Land, @Shrines and Holy places, @status of kings; future of monarchy
